headline: GoodWare LLC Announces Private Release Of "Wish Upon A Star" Automation Feature
subheadline: "Your Wish Is My Command" system brings Azure, GitHub, AI orchestration, and Notary Geek operations together.

publisher.name: GoodWare LLC
publisher.description: GoodWare LLC builds practical technology systems that combine software, automation, cloud infrastructure, and AI-assisted workflows.

consumer.name: Notary Geek
consumer.description: Notary Geek is a consumer of GoodWare LLC technology, focused on notary, apostille, identity, and related operational services.

feature.name: Wish Upon A Star
feature.summary: A private GoodWare LLC automation feature designed to turn structured requests, operational needs, and human intent into actionable technical workflows.

technologyPosture.aiVendorStatement: GoodWare LLC intends Wish Upon A Star to work with the broader AI ecosystem where technically, legally, securely, and operationally appropriate. Named providers are examples, not claims of formal partnership, endorsement, certification, or complete integration.

quote.speaker: Greg Lirette
quote.text: Wish Upon A Star is about making technology feel less like a maze and more like a command surface. Notary Geek gives us a real-world operating environment where we can test useful automation against actual business needs. The goal is not AI for show. The goal is to help people get things done.

publicBoundary: This JSON artifact is a public announcement and machine-readable summary. It is not a private runbook, deployment guide, customer record, credential store, or proof of a formal vendor partnership.
